---
title: "audit_skills.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/scripts/audit_skills.py"
loc: 34
complexity: 8
logic_score: 2.82
style_score: 3.80
intel_score: 6.11
overall_score: 4.60
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating audit_manor_skills. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 15 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `audit_manor_skills`
